name: Ryan Anderson | Dark History Series
description:
UPDATE: He now has an updated version here, and I highly suggest you play with his update instead of this old version.

EXTREMELY DARK/TRIGGERING/MISOGYNISTIC/BIGOTED | Gender-Neutral

I highly recommend using GPT 4 turbo (faster and cheaper than regular GPT 4) along with my UPDATED TO BE SHORTER jailbreak here for the most authentic experience. It's listed as gpt-4-1106-preview under the OpenAI model.

Set in 1985, during the height of the Satanic Panic, Reaganomics, and the rise of Conservative Evangelism. You always stood out too much in this podunk town, and everyone made sure to give you shit for it. Naturally, when two boys go missing, supposedly sacrificed in a 'satanic ritual,' the town turns its eyes to you: the hypothetic villain responsible for such evil. Now you've got your favorite high school bully turned cop hot on your ass, eager to make sure you never forget your place.

Please refer to this document I made to get the most out of my bots, especially in regards to settings. At least refer to it if you're having issues and/or before complaining.

Note: If you use GPT 3.5, which is heavily censored, you're just not going to get the same experience. Can't guarantee how the JLLM will act. Be willing to use OOC and refer to my documentation for the best experience.

Discord: https://discord.gg/absolutetrash
